lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: You! Get to work!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: You are here to help work the blast furnace, aren't you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the blast furnace?

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: The blast furnace is the pinnacle of dwarven metal- processing! Ore goes in the top and comes out as metal bars almost at once! And it's so efficient it only takes half as much coal to purify it as a regular furnace.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: But we've got a bit of a labour shortage at the moment, which is why I have to rely on immigrant workers to keep the furnace going. So, are you here to start work?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I help work the blast furnace?

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: The blast furnace will only work if there is a group of people keeping it going. Let me explain...

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Firstly, the stove needs to be kept filled with coal. If this runs out the furnace will not work.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Secondly, someone needs to operate the pump that keeps the hot air blast circulating through the furnace.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Thirdly, someone needs to keep an eye on the temperature gauge. They should tell the pumper to start or stop so that the temperature stays in the right range.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Lastly, someone needs to be on the pedals to power the conveyor belt that puts ore into the furnace.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Someone will also need to be on standby with a hammer in case the machine breaks!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: While that's going, anyone else can put their ore on the conveyor belt to have it smelted.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what do I get out of it?

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Keeping the furnace going is valuable experience in itself!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Keeping the stove alight will train your Firemaking, working the pump will train your Strength, pedalling the conveyor belt will train your Agility and repairing the furnace will train Crafting.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Plus, everyone working the furnace will get a bit of experience in Smithing whenever anyone smelts ore in it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I don't actually get paid then?

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: I offer you the privilege of working on the greatest example of dwarven engineering and you want to be PAID?

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: If you co-operate with a group of people you can all get your smelting done pretty quickly. Or perhaps some humans who need to do some smelting will pay you, since you humans are all so obsessed with money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No wonder you have a labour shortage if you don't pay your workers!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: What would be the point of making money if I gave it all away to menial workers?

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: I mean... Money isn't important! What about the greater glory of dwarven engineering? What about the satisfaction of helping others? What about the XP?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll get to work.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Splendid!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I use the furnace to smelt ore?

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: You can, although you'll need to find some people to work it for you as well. But the furnace is very delicate so I charge a fee for anyone who doesn't have level 60 smithing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have level 60!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: A human has level 60 smithing? How extraordinary!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Feel free to use the furnace. Remember, you only need half as much coal as with a regular furnace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have level 60.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Hmm, well, I'll let you use the furnace if you want, but you must pay a fee of 2,500 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here you are.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Where?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually I don't have enough money on me.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Well go get it then.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Okay, you can use the furnace for ten minutes. Remember, you only need half as much coal as with a regular furnace.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How about I give you 1250 coins and I work extra hard?

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: You'll have to work hard enough for two humans if I agree...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, three humans, easily!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Well, okay then - 1250GP it is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually I don't have enough money on me.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Well why did you try and haggle with me then? You'd better go and get some - you're not using the blast furnace for free.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Okay, you can use the furnace for ten minutes. Remember, you only need half as much coal as with a regular furnace. And I want to see you doing the work of four humans!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe some other time.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Well if you're not here to work, go hang around somewhere else!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to borrow your blast furnace.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: You can have it a couple of hours for 170,000 coins.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm trying to create an ingot of chromium, and I need your blast furnace to do so.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: You have knowledge of how to make chromium?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'm pretty sure it involves a blast furnace...

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: I'm not going to close my shop for someone who is 'pretty sure'. Come back when you have a better idea.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I had to get sloshed to figure it out, but yes.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: That makes perfect sense. Okay then, you can have the furnace, but it's going to cost you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Good enough for me. You can have the furnace but it's going to cost you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll need a couple of hours for each chromium ingot. How much is that going to cost me?

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Let's see. Cost of labour... Opportunity cost... Carry the four...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have that much money on me.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have the money right here.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: I'll go get everything ready for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's a bit too pricey for me.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Come back if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: You are an experienced smith, you may use the furnace free of charge!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Remember, you only need half as much coal as with a regular furnace.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: What is this? The fee to use the furnace is 2,500 coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have enough money on me.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Well go and get it then.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Okay, you can use the furnace for ten minutes. Remember, you only need half as much coal as with a regular furnace.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Somebody refuel the stove!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Somebody fix that pipe!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Somebody work the conveyer belt!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Somebody fix the conveyer belt!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Somebody operate the pump!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Keep the temperature controlled.

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: That's it, keep it going!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: Work faster!

lines.speaker: Blast Furnace Foreman
lines.text: You fools, you let it overheat!
